products.name: Velvet Matte Lipstick (Rose Petal)
products.description: Indulge in our signature Velvet Matte Lipstick. A high-pigment formula that glides on smoothly, leaving a gorgeous blush-pink matte finish that lasts all day without drying your lips.
products.howToUse: Apply directly to lips starting from the center and moving outwards. For a more defined look, line lips with a matching lip liner first.
products.ingredients: Dimethicone, Octyldodecanol, Polyethylene, Polysilicone-11, Silica, Kaolin, Rose Flower Extract, Tocopheryl Acetate, Fragrance.

products.name: Glow Radiance Serum (2% Hyaluronic)
products.description: Get the ultimate dewy, hydrated skin. Formulated with 2% pure hyaluronic acid, organic rose water extracts, and vitamin B5 to plump, nourish, and lock in moisture.
products.howToUse: Apply 2-3 drops to clean, dry skin in the morning and evening. Gently press into the face and neck, avoiding the eye area. Follow with your favorite moisturizer.
products.ingredients: Water (Aqua), Hyaluronic Acid, Rose Damascena Flower Water, Panthenol (Vitamin B5), Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.

products.name: Pink Quartz Face Roller & Gua Sha Set
products.description: Handcrafted from authentic Brazilian pink rose quartz. Use this beauty tool daily to reduce puffiness, promote lymphatic drainage, and relieve muscle tension in your face.
products.howToUse: Apply a face oil or serum first. Use the larger roller for cheeks, forehead, and neck in upward/outward motions. Use the smaller roller under eyes. Use Gua Sha for deeper facial massage along the jawline and cheekbones.
products.ingredients: 100% Authentic Grade-A Brazilian Pink Rose Quartz Stone.

products.name: Blossom Eau de Parfum (50ml)
products.description: An elegant, captivating scent combining sweet peony blossoms, Bulgarian rose, vanilla beans, and a warm hint of white musk. Perfect for daily wear or romantic evenings.
products.howToUse: Spray onto pulse points: wrists, neck, behind the ears, and inner elbows. Do not rub the perfume into your skin, as this can break down the fragrance molecules.
products.ingredients: Alcohol Denat., Fragrance (Parfum), Water (Aqua), Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Limonene, Geraniol, Citronellol.

products.name: Hydrating Lip Oil (Sweet Cherry)
products.description: Combine the shine of a gloss with the intense nourishment of a balm. Our Sweet Cherry Lip Oil is enriched with jojoba and cherry seed oils for non-sticky, juicy, protected lips.
products.howToUse: Glide over bare lips or layer over your lipstick for a glassy, high-shine moisturizing barrier.
products.ingredients: Jojoba Seed Oil, Cherry Seed Oil, Hydrogenated Polydecene, Tocopherol, Squalane, Fragrance.

products.name: Gold Collagen Eye Patches (60 pcs)
products.description: Rejuvenate tired eyes in 15 minutes! These luxury hydrogel eye patches are infused with active collagen, real gold particles, and green tea extracts to reduce dark circles and fine lines.
products.howToUse: Use the enclosed spatula to lift patches, apply under clean dry eyes. Leave for 15-20 minutes. Discard patches and pat remaining serum into the skin.
products.ingredients: Hydrolyzed Collagen, Colloidal Gold, Camellia Sinensis (Green Tea) Leaf Extract, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate.

products.name: Volumizing Mascara (Deep Black)
products.description: Define, lift, and lengthen your lashes with our zero-clump Volumizing Mascara. Designed with a flexible hourglass brush to coat every lash for 24 hours of bold volume.
products.howToUse: Wiggle the brush from the lash root to the tip. Layer multiple coats for high-volume drama.
products.ingredients: Water, Carnauba Wax, Stearic Acid, Iron Oxides (CI 77499), Acrylates Copolymer, beeswax.

products.name: Silky Satin Sleep Mask (Blush Pink)
products.description: Protect your skin and eyes from friction during sleep. Made from ultra-soft, hypoallergenic blush pink satin, this mask blocks out light completely for deep, luxurious beauty sleep.
products.howToUse: Adjust the elastic strap to fit comfortably around your head. Place gently over eyes before sleeping.

reviews.name: hamid
reviews.text: i did not love the actual  product to be hones plz fix costummer  treatment

reviews.name: Sarah B.
reviews.text: OMG I love the Rose Petal lipstick! The pigment is beautiful and it stays on forever! Delivery to Alger was super fast.

reviews.name: Nour M.
reviews.text: The Glow Radiance Serum makes my skin look so dewy. Highly recommend Nouna Shop!

reviews.name: Lina K.
reviews.text: Perfect Gua Sha set. Very high quality rose quartz. It arrived safely and well-packaged. Shipping to Oran took 2 days.

reviews.name: Amel D.
reviews.text: My husband bought me the Blossom Perfume and it smells amazing! I get compliments on it all the time.

items.name: Pink Quartz Face Roller & Gua Sha Set
